title: lathyrus occidentalis subsp. scopolii
intro: Lathyrus occidentalis subsp. scopolii, also known as Western lathyrus or Western peavine, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae) and is native to the western regions of North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Lathyrus occidentalis subsp. scopolii include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as relief from menstrual cramps and menopausal symptoms. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, with the dried root and stems being used in herbal medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
